feedback: Clean package. No kill switch violations. LinkedIn leads with a personal pattern recognition hook, weaves the Azure post-mortem and executive departures into a single thread, and lands on a practical infrastructure question — no neat bow. Bluesky is native: lowercase, punchy, first-person credibility established in two sentences. Builder detail present in LinkedIn ('I use Claude Code, not OpenAI's tools'). Cross-platform claims are consistent. Art is missing but not auto-fail. Both drafts are above threshold.
art_note: No editorial art provided. Not an automatic fail — noted for completeness.
